title: Ford Fiesta Spark Plug Type, Gap & Torque | OEM Specs
description: Factory spark plug specifications for the Ford Fiesta. Type, gap, and torque specs per engine from the OEM service manual.
quickAnswer: 1.0L EcoBoost: HYFS 093 YEC, gap 0.7 mm, torque 115 in-lbs. 1.6L Duratec: CYFS 12Y EC, gap 0.7-0.8 mm, torque 133 in-lbs. 1.6L EcoBoost: CYFS 13Y RC, gap 0.8 mm, torque 133 in-lbs.

generations.name: 1.0L EcoBoost
notes: Coil-on-plug design. Use only specified plug type to avoid misfire.

generations.name: 1.6L EcoBoost
notes: Turbocharged engine requires correct heat-range plug.

faq.q: What spark plugs does a Ford Fiesta use?
faq.a: Depends on engine: 1.0L EcoBoost uses HYFS 093 YEC with 0.7 mm gap. 1.6L Duratec uses CYFS 12Y EC with 0.7-0.8 mm gap. 1.6L EcoBoost uses CYFS 13Y RC with 0.8 mm gap.

faq.q: What is the spark plug torque for a Ford Fiesta?
faq.a: 115 in-lbs (13 Nm) for 1.0L EcoBoost. 133 in-lbs (15 Nm) for 1.6L Duratec and 1.6L EcoBoost.

title: Ford Fiesta Serpentine Belt Routing & Replacement
description: Factory serpentine belt routing and adjustment for the Ford Fiesta. Accessory drive belt system specs per engine.
quickAnswer: Auto-tensioner system. Belt routing varies by engine: 1.0L EcoBoost, 1.6L Duratec, and 1.6L EcoBoost each have specific component locations.

generations.name: All Engines

specs.Belt Routing: Varies by engine. See Accessory Drive Belt component location diagram.

notes: Replace belt if chunks missing or cords exposed. Cracks on rib side are acceptable per Ford.

faq.q: Does the Ford Fiesta have a serpentine belt tensioner?
faq.a: Yes. All Fiesta engines use an automatic tensioner. No manual belt adjustment is required.

title: Kia Soul Spark Plug Type, Gap & Torque | OEM Specs
description: Factory spark plug specifications for the Kia Soul. Type, gap, and torque specs per engine from the OEM service manual.
quickAnswer: 1.6L: Champion RER8MC, gap 0.0394-0.0433 in (1.0-1.1 mm). 2.0L: Refer to IGNITION SYSTEM page for specific type. Both use coil-on-plug design.

generations.name: 1.6L
notes: No. 1 cylinder is closest to water pump. Coil-on-plug design.

generations.name: 2.0L
notes: Refer to factory IGNITION SYSTEM page for specific plug type.

faq.q: What spark plugs does a Kia Soul use?
faq.a: 1.6L engine uses Champion RER8MC with gap 0.0394-0.0433 in (1.0-1.1 mm). 2.0L uses coil-on-plug; check the factory IGNITION SYSTEM page for specific type.

title: Kia Soul Serpentine Belt Routing & Replacement
description: Factory serpentine belt routing and adjustment for the Kia Soul. Drive belt system specs per engine.
quickAnswer: Auto-tensioner on 1.6L and 2.0L. Belt routing diagrams are in the REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION section for each engine.

generations.name: 1.6L & 2.0L

specs.Belt Routing: See Identifying Drive Belt figure under REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION for your engine.

notes: Replace if chunks missing or cords exposed.

faq.q: How do you replace the serpentine belt on a Kia Soul?
faq.a: Use the auto-tensioner to release belt tension. Routing diagram is in the factory REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION section for your specific engine (1.6L or 2.0L).

title: Kia Sportage Serpentine Belt Routing & Replacement
description: Factory serpentine belt routing and adjustment for the Kia Sportage. Drive belt system specs per engine.
quickAnswer: Auto-tensioner on 2.0L and 2.4L. Belt routing diagrams are in the REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION section for each engine.

generations.name: 2.0L & 2.4L

specs.Belt Routing: See Turning Drive Belt Tensioner figure under REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION for your engine.

notes: Replace if chunks missing or cords exposed.

faq.q: How do you replace the serpentine belt on a Kia Sportage?
faq.a: Use the auto-tensioner to release belt tension. Routing diagram is in the factory REMOVAL AND INSTALLATION section for your specific engine (2.0L or 2.4L).

title: Ford Fiesta Battery Location & Specifications
description: Factory battery specifications for the Ford Fiesta. Location, CCA, and amp-hour ratings per engine.
quickAnswer: 1.0L EcoBoost: 56 amp/hr, 590 CCA. 1.6L Duratec/EcoBoost: 48 amp/hr, 500 CCA. 12V system.

faq.q: What size battery does a Ford Fiesta need?
faq.a: 1.0L EcoBoost: 56 amp/hr, 590 CCA. 1.6L Duratec or EcoBoost: 48 amp/hr, 500 CCA. All are 12V.
